user.title: Connect to Busch-Radio iNet
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Busch-Radio iNet device. Make sure the Energy Mode is set to 'Premium' (not Eco).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Please check the IP address and ensure Energy Mode is set to Premium.

init.title: Now Playing – Metadata Settings
init.description: Configure ICY stream metadata to show the current song title. The update interval only applies to Interval mode.
